data.title: Gold Futures Maintain Bullish Momentum, Analysts Predict Further Gains
data.description: According to Odaily, RHB Retail Research analyst Joseph Chai has observed a strong upward trend in New York Mercantile Exchange gold futures based on daily chart analysis. Chai noted that gold prices closed above the $3,200 per ounce resistance level on Friday, confirming ongoing bullish pressure. The analyst highlighted that the Relative Strength Index has surpassed the 50% threshold, indicating accelerating bullish momentum. Furthermore, Chai stated that the bullish structure remains intact as gold futures continue to trade above the 20-day and 50-day simple moving averages. He added that this positive momentum could drive gold prices to reach $3,300 per ounce in the coming days.

data.title: Binance will launch spot trading pairs such as BABY/EUR and open trading robot services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will launch BABY/EUR, ONDO/TRY and PAXG/USDC spot trading pairs at 08:00 (UTC) on April 15, 2025. At the same time, Binance will open trading robot services for the following trading pairs: spot algorithmic orders (BABY/EUR, ONDO/TRY, PAXG/USDC) and spot grids and spot fixed investments (ZK/USDC). (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: European Stock Markets Surge with Major Indices Rising
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European stock markets opened higher and continued to rise, with major indices showing significant gains. The UK's FTSE 100 index increased by 2%, while Germany's DAX index, France's CAC 40 index, Italy's FTSE MIB index, and the Euro Stoxx 50 index all rose by approximately 2.4%.

data.title: U.S. tech stocks rose across the board before the market opened, with Apple up 6%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. technology stocks rose before the market opened, Apple (AAPL.O) rose 6%, Nvidia (NVDA.O) and Alibaba (BABA.N) rose more than 3%, and Tesla (TSLA.O) rose 2.3%. (Jinshi)

data.title: France, Italy Urge EU to Reform Blockchain Regulations
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, April 14, 2025-France and Italy have jointly called on the European Commission to revise its approach to blockchain regulation, submitting a proposal Wednesday to revamp the EU’s distributed ledger technology (DLT) framework. The move comes amid criticism of the EU’s 2023 Pilot Regime, which has drawn limited participation and failed to meet its […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/france-italy-urge-eu-to-reform-blockchain-regulations

data.title: BitMart will list KernelDAO (KERNEL)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch KernelDAO (KERNEL) at 20:00 (Eastern Time) on April 14, and the KERNEL/USDT trading pair will be launched.
KernelDAO is a re-staking ecosystem on the Ethereum and BNB chains, and its products cover re-staking and automatic reward generation. By achieving shared security and maximizing the utility of staked assets such as ETH, BTC and BNB, it enhances the network security, liquidity and reward generation of the entire ecosystem. KERNEL is the native utility and governance token in the KernelDAO ecosystem.

data.title: Monad Testnet Sees Surge in Address and Transaction Numbers
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Monad testnet has reached a total of 167,902,196 addresses. In the past 24 hours, there have been 5,627,126 new addresses added and nearly 17 million transactions recorded.

data.title: Metaplanet Now the Ninth Largest Public BTC Holder
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After increasing its holdings of BTC today, Metaplanet has become the ninth largest public holder of BTC, currently holding 4525 BTC (about 381,824,466 US dollars). (Solid Intel)

data.title: OKX will launch WCT spot trading on April 15
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will launch WCT (WalletConnect) spot trading on April 15. The specific schedule is as follows: WCT call auction period: 10:00 to 11:00 am on April 15 (UTC); WCT/USDT spot trading opening time: 11:00 am on April 15 (UTC); WCT withdrawal opening time: 11:00 am on April 16 (UTC). (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Market Analysis: A weaker dollar could reduce inflation among U.S. trading partners
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Thu Lan Nguyen, an analyst at Commerzbank, said that due to Trump's tariff policy, the depreciation of the US dollar may reduce the inflation rate of US trading partners. She said: "If this situation continues, most central banks will not be in a dilemma: weighing economic and inflation risks." This will allow further interest rate cuts, thereby reducing the appreciation pressure of non-US currencies against the US dollar. She said that for now, the impact of tariffs seems extremely unlikely to be reversed. (Jinshi)
